hero.description: Stop defending your budget. Start proving your impact.
hero.descriptionRest: Leanmote is an engineering intelligence platform that moves beyond static dashboards into

cockpit.description: One screen linking allocation, predictability, throughput and capacity — so you can justify every headcount with operational evidence.
cockpit.insightBody: Mobile team predictability dropped 15% this sprint. Root cause: 3 unplanned security patches absorbed 28% of capacity.

knowledgeGraph.description: Leanmote connects Jira, Git and collaboration signals into one causal model. Spot the exact dependency chain behind every delay, in real time.
knowledgeGraph.aiInsightsBody: Engineering and Design approval loops are creating cascading delays. Consider parallel workflows instead of sequential reviews.

agenticWorkflows.description: Other tools leave the fixing to you. Leanmote's agentic workflows actively assist in decision-making — routing work, simulating impact, and closing the loop automatically.
agenticWorkflows.statLabel: less manual management overhead with agentic workflows

highlights.title: Automated action plans
highlights.description: When a bottleneck is detected, Leanmote generates tailored "recipes" to resolve it — not just alerts.

highlights.title: MCP decision augmentation
highlights.description: Simulate the impact of resource shifts before you make them. See the future before it happens.

highlights.title: Early warnings
highlights.description: AI-driven burnout and silo detection, with agent-led suggestions for redistribution.

impactDashboard.title: Prove your AI investment with
impactDashboard.description: Many teams buy AI coding tools. Few can translate usage into measurable business outcomes. Leanmote establishes the baseline — and tracks every dollar saved.
